response.description_short: Loopnote is a private, end-to-end encrypted journaling app that turns entries into weekly reflections on themes, moods, and habits.
response.description_long:
Loopnote is a consumer journaling app: users write freely and the app notices themes, moods, and habits, delivering a Sunday summary of the week. Entries are end-to-end encrypted, with no ads, feeds, or social graph, and everything is exportable.

The site suggests uses from morning pages to therapy prep. It is free for 30 days, then $4 a month, on iOS and Android. The site names no team and states no location or founding year.
